title: Bronze Incense Holder
description: A low stand for a single coal — enough height for attention, not theatre. Bronze ages quietly; patina is part of the ritual.
narrativeTitle: Heat at the right height — smoke that remembers the room.
narrativeBody: The stand is a small anchor: it keeps the line thin, the ash honest, and the desk from becoming a stage.
atmosphereQuote: When the line rises thin, the room learns its own metronome.
